subcodes.title: Words to a young man, spoken on 1913-01-22
subcodes.first_line: Now that you are returning to America, pass through all the large cities on the way, meet the friends of God and associate with them.
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @goodly deeds; actions, @personal instructions, @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God
